insights.leaderDesc: Eletrobras is the largest I-REC seller in Brazil, with 14.5 million certificates in 2025, growth of 57.6%.
insights.growthDesc: Voltalia Brasil showed the biggest market growth with 127% increase in I-REC volume.
insights.financeDesc: Banks like Itaú, Bradesco and Banco do Brasil are major I-REC buyers for offsetting operations.

insights.bigTechDesc: Amazon, Microsoft, Meta and Google are the 4 largest global buyers of renewable energy.
insights.growthDesc: The industrial sector (Rio Tinto) shows acceleration in energy transition in 2025.
insights.diversityDesc: Semiconductor and retail companies also appear at the top of the global ranking.

insights.microsoftDesc: Microsoft has consolidated its position as the largest global buyer of high-integrity carbon credits.
insights.cdrDesc: Carbon Dioxide Removal (CDR) technologies attract massive investments from technology and logistics companies.
insights.portfolioDesc: Some energy giants are reducing nature-based credit volumes to focus on technology.

CarbonoProjetos.title: Carbon Projects
CarbonoProjetos.subtitle: Interactive visualization of carbon projects registered in the voluntary market.
CarbonoProjetos.projectIdsDesc: Each carbon project has a unique identifier (ID) indicating the registry where it is registered:

projectIdDetails.vcs: Verra Carbon Standard (e.g., VCS2547) - The world's largest carbon credit registry system
projectIdDetails.car: Climate Action Reserve (e.g., CAR1019) - American registry
projectIdDetails.acr: American Carbon Registry (e.g., ACR1000) - American carbon registry
projectIdDetails.gld: Gold Standard (e.g., GLD7737) - Swiss standard for carbon and sustainable development projects
projectIdDetails.cdm: Clean Development Mechanism (e.g., CDM1234) - UN Clean Development Mechanism
projectIdDetails.gs: Gold Standard (e.g., GS1234) - Modern version of Gold Standard

CarbonoProjetos.aboutDataDesc: This data is provided by carbonplan.org, an independent research organization that analyzes and freely available information about carbon projects.
CarbonoProjetos.aboutDataNote: Note: This page shows listed projects but not yet issued. Issued credits will be added as data is updated.
CarbonoProjetos.downloadDesc: Download the complete data in CSV format for offline analysis.

IrecPrecos.projectionDesc: The global I-REC market is expected to reach between 800 and 1,000 TWh by 2030, driven by RE100 multinational targets.

Termos.heroDesc: By using Sintropia, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

1.title: Acceptance of Terms
1.content: By accessing and using Sintropia, you accept and agree to comply with these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, you should not use our platform.

2.title: Description of Service
2.content: Sintropia is an open data platform that offers:
list: Data on the carbon market and renewable energy
A community for discussion and information sharing
Public user profiles
Posting and social interaction features
2.footer: The service is provided as a collaborative open source project.

3.title: Account Registration
3.content: To use certain features, you can create an account:
list: You must provide true and updated information
You are responsible for maintaining your account security
You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized use
You must be at least 18 years old to create an account

4.title: User Content
4.content: Sintropia is an open data platform. By design:
list: Posts, comments and profiles are public by default
You retain ownership of the content you publish
By publishing, you grant us license to display your content
You are responsible for the content you publish

5.title: Conditions of Use
list: Publish illegal, defamatory or abusive content
Use the platform for illegal activities
Attempt to access other users' accounts
Post spam or unsolicited commercial content
Infringe third-party intellectual property rights
Create multiple accounts to evade restrictions

6.title: Moderation and Suspension
list: Remove content that violates these terms
Suspend or terminate offending accounts
Modify or discontinue the service at any time

7.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
7.content: The service is provided "as is" and "as available". We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure or error-free. Data is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute financial or professional advice.

8.title: Limitation of Liability
8.content: Under no circumstances will we be liable for any indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service.

9.title: Market Data
9.content: Carbon and energy market data available on the platform:
list: Is provided for informational purposes only
Does not constitute financial or investment advice
May contain inaccuracies and delays
We are not responsible for decisions made based on this data

10.title: Intellectual Property
10.content: Sintropia is an open source project. The source code is available on GitHub under MIT license. Public data can be used, provided the source is credited.

11.title: Changes to Terms
11.content: We may revise these terms periodically. The current version will always be on this page. Continued use of the platform after changes indicates your acceptance of the new terms.

12.title: Contact
12.content: If you have questions about these terms, contact us:

Privacidade.heroDesc: This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your information.

1.title: Information We Collect
1.content: Sintropia is an open data platform. We collect the following information:
list: Public data: username, bio, avatar and posts you choose to share publicly
Authentication data: email and password (encrypted) for site account
Usage data: anonymous information about how you interact with the platform

2.title: How We Use Your Information
list: Provide and maintain our services
Authenticate your account and allow login
Publish your content (posts, comments) publicly
Improve and personalize your experience on the platform
Send important communications about the platform

3.title: Data Sharing
3.content: Sintropia is an open data platform. By default:
list: Your posts, profile and activities are public by design
We do not sell your personal data to third parties
We may share aggregated and anonymized data for statistical purposes
We only share personal data when required by law

4.title: Security
4.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information:
list: Passwords stored with hash and encryption
Encrypted connections via HTTPS
Restricted access to personal data
Continuous security monitoring

5.title: Your Rights
5.content: You have the following rights regarding your data:
list: Access: Request a copy of your personal data
Correction: Request correction of incorrect data
Deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
Portability: Request your data in a readable format
5.footer: To exercise these rights, contact us through GitHub.

6.title: Cookies
6.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences. You can disable cookies in your browser, but this may affect some site functionality.

7.title: Children
7.content: Our service is not intended for minors under 13. We do not intentionally collect information from children.

8.title: Changes
8.content: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the site. The most current version will always be available on this page.

9.title: Contact
9.content: If you have questions about this policy, contact us:
